scripts.dev: concurrently -n SITE,LIB "pnpm run --filter site dev" "pnpm run --filter paleui dev"
scripts.dist: pnpm run --filter paleui dist; pnpm run --filter site dist
scripts.preview: pnpm run dist; pnpm run --filter site preview;
scripts.test:run:docker-up: docker compose -f docker-compose.playwright.yml up -d --wait && PW_TEST_CONNECT_WS_ENDPOINT=ws://localhost:3000/ playwright test
